name: Hardcover
author: Michael Beck
description: Book and audiobook metadata from Hardcover.app, plus reading history import.
iconUrl: data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 24 24'><rect x='3' y='3' width='18' height='18' rx='2' fill='%237c3aed'/><path fill='white' d='M7 7h10v2H7zm0 4h10v2H7zm0 4h7v2H7z'/></svg>
fixMatchHint: Paste a Hardcover book, series, or author URL (e.g. https://hardcover.app/books/the-way-of-kings)

background_tasks.description: Imports full reading history, ratings, and want-to-read list from Hardcover.
Imports reading activity added since the last sync.
